final_prompt.prompt:
Create an editorial sports photograph capturing a peak moment in an NBA basketball game.

Style/medium: professional sports photography in the style of Getty Images, photorealistic, 1/2000 second shutter freeze
Composition: telephoto lens compression, tight framing on airborne player at rim height, low-angle perspective emphasizing vertical elevation
Subject: NBA player mid-air executing a powerful dunk, right arm extended high with ball, wrist cocked for the slam, face showing explosive intensity and focus, sweat droplets frozen mid-flight
Scene/backdrop: blurred arena crowd creating bokeh, sea of colorful glow sticks and phone flashlights forming dreamy light points, opposing player below jumping for a block attempt
Lighting/mood: dramatic overhead arena lights creating strong chiaroscuro contrast on the athlete's body, rim lighting on sweat droplets, theatrical tension
Color palette: warm skin tones and orange basketball as anchor, cool arena shadows, vibrant multicolor crowd bokeh as accent
Materials/textures: glistening sweat beads with specular highlights, textured basketball surface, fabric weave of jersey visible
Avoid: plastic skin, motion blur on main subject, watermark, over-sharpening, 8K stuffer aesthetic, cartoonish proportions
